query_type.description: Category of the user query (e.g., Troubleshooting, Configuration, Information).

domain.description: The specific Windows domain (e.g., Registry, Active Directory, Networking).

answer.description: The final structured technical explanation or resolution.

references.description: Related documentation, KB articles, or external resources.

confidence_score.description: AI confidence in the provided solution (0.0 to 1.0).
